stemHtml: When the temperature is at (1) _____ and the water vapour changes from (2) _____ the process is called (3) _____.

options.a: (1) 10°C or below; (2) water to gas; (3) fusion.
options.b: (1) 0°C or below; (2) ice to gas; (3) sublimation.
options.c: (1) 10°C or below; (2) ice to water; (3) crystallisation.
options.d: (1) 0°C or below; (2) water to ice; (3) deposition.
